pages.text: Welcome to Unnamed Nuclear! This mod brings a high level of realism to nuclear engineering in Minecraft. $(br2)Your journey begins with prospecting for Uranium and Fluorite ores, found deep in the world.

The fundamental path is:$(br)1. Mine and process ores into raw materials.$(br)2. Use the Chemical Converter to create UF6 gas.$(br)3. Enrich UF6 in a Centrifuge cascade.$(br)4. Fabricate Nuclear Fuel rods.$(br)5. Build a reactor and generate power!
